name: BITGO HOLDINGS, INC.
summary: BitGo Holdings, Inc. is a digital asset infrastructure company providing institutional clients with secure custody, wallet, liquidity, and infrastructure-as-a-service solutions. Products include self-custody wallets, qualified custody through BitGo Trust Companies, staking, trading, and settlement services. As of December 31, 2025, BitGo supported over 5,320 clients, over 1.2 million users, 1,770+ digital assets, and approximately $81.6 billion in Assets on Platform across 100+ countries.

products.name: Self-Custody Wallet
products.description: Wallet technology allowing clients to securely manage and store digital assets without relying on third-party custody.

products.name: Qualified Custody
products.description: Licensed digital asset custody via BitGo Trust Companies held in segregated, bankruptcy-remote accounts for institutional clients.

products.name: Liquidity and Prime
products.description: Liquidity solutions including staking, trading, and settlement services for digital asset participants.

products.name: Infrastructure-as-a-Service
products.description: Scalable digital asset infrastructure enabling financial institutions and technology platforms to power their own products and services.
